---
title: "Inlämning GLM"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library('foreign')
library('haven')# this package is needed to read Stata version 5-12 .dta file 
library('labelled')# this is needed to undo all the annoying things haven does
#GSSdata24 <- as.data.frame( read_dta( 'GSS2024.dta' ), stringsAsFactors=FALSE ) # once you have downloaded the .dta you can read it using read_dta
#GSSdata22 <- as.data.frame( read_dta( 'GSS2022.dta' ), stringsAsFactors=FALSE ) # once you have downloaded the .dta you can read it using read_dta
```
